features.name: Oath of Devotion
features.description: You make a sacred vow, promising to protect the innocent and punish the wicked. You gain the Devotion feature.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, you can cause the attack to deal radiant damage instead of its normal damage.

features.name: Channel Divinity (1/day) - Aid Ally
features.description: Choose an ally within 60 feet. The target gains advantage on the next ability check or saving throw it makes before the end of your next turn.

features.name: Divine Health
features.description: You have resistance to poison damage and you can use a bonus action to gain temporary hit points equal to twice your paladin level when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: You have a pool of mana that you can use to heal yourself or others. You regain 1d8 + 2 healing when you take the bonus action to use this feature.

features.name: Oath Spells
features.description: At 5th level, you gain spellcasting abilities depending on your oath. You can cast holy word and you know the bless cantrip. You can study a new oath at each level after 20th.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: You emit an aura that provides protection to those within it. Your allies gain advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, or poisoned while within 10 feet of you.

features.name: Divine Smite (2/day) - Holy Weapon
features.description: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, the weapon becomes holy and deals radiant damage. It remains holy until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Divine Health (2/week) - Channel Divinity: Aura of Life
features.description: You gain the ability to use the Aura of Protection feature once per week as a Channel Divinity option, providing healing instead of protection.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Smite Evil or Good
